# glossary

## Concepts

* [Backfill](backfill.md) - Recompute derived data for the past.
* [Blast Radius](blast-radius.md) - What breaks when this breaks.
* [Canary](canary.md) - A small slice that ships first.
* [Cold Start](cold-start.md)
* [Dead Letter](dead-letter.md)
* [Drift](drift.md) - Config diverging from source of truth.
* [Error Budget](error-budget.md) - How much unreliability the SLO affords.
* [Fan-out](fan-out.md) - One event, many consumers.
* [Idempotent](idempotent.md) - Safe to apply more than once.
* [p99](p99.md) - Ninety-ninth percentile latency.
* [Runway](runway.md)
* [Shard](shard.md)
* [SLO](slo.md) - Service level objective.
* [Toil](toil.md) - Manual, repetitive, automatable work.
* [Watermark](watermark.md) - Progress marker in a stream.
